message:
refactor: Duration::from_mins in kafka/dns for readability

Additional Duration constant improvements from concurrent agents:

- messaging/kafka.rs: TransactionalConfig default timeout from_secs(60)
  → from_mins(1), test assertion from_secs(120) → from_mins(2)
- net/dns/lookup.rs: test LookupIp TTL from_secs(300) → from_mins(5)
- net/dns/resolver.rs: default TTL from_secs(300) → from_mins(5),
  test cache TTL from_secs(300) → from_mins(5)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
